backlog.title: Project scaffolding and tooling
backlog.description: Initialize Next.js 15 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest, ESLint. Configure vitest.config.ts and CI-ready scripts.
acceptance_criteria: npm run dev starts without errors
npm run build produces a production build
npm run lint runs ESLint with zero errors
npm run typecheck runs tsc --noEmit with zero errors

backlog.title: PR URL parser
backlog.description: Pure function parsePrUrl(input) that extracts {owner, repo, pullNumber} from a GitHub PR URL. Handles variations and rejects invalid input.
acceptance_criteria: Handles trailing slashes, query strings, fragments
Rejects non-GitHub URLs with descriptive error

backlog.title: GitHub API client — PR metadata
backlog.description: Fetch PR metadata (title, body, author, branches, state) from GitHub REST API v3. Optional auth token for higher rate limits.
acceptance_criteria: Sends Authorization header when token provided

backlog.title: GitHub API client — PR diff
backlog.description: Extend GitHub client to fetch raw unified diff for a PR using the diff media type.

backlog.title: Diff processing utilities
backlog.description: Pure functions: truncateDiff (char limit at hunk boundaries), filterDiff (remove lock/binary files), extractDiffStats (count files/insertions/deletions).
acceptance_criteria: truncateDiff cuts at hunk boundaries, appends [truncated] marker
filterDiff removes lock files, binary markers, configurable patterns

backlog.title: Claude prompt builder
backlog.description: Pure function buildAnalysisPrompt that takes PrMetadata and processed diff, returns system+user message pair instructing Claude to return structured JSON.
acceptance_criteria: User message includes PR metadata and diff

backlog.title: Claude API client
backlog.description: Client using @anthropic-ai/sdk to send analysis prompt and parse structured JSON response. Uses claude-sonnet-4-20250514.
acceptance_criteria: Parses text response as JSON into AnalysisResult

backlog.title: POST /api/analyze route
backlog.description: Next.js API route orchestrating the full flow: validate input, parse URL, fetch PR, process diff, call Claude, return analysis.
acceptance_criteria: Returns 200 with full AnalysisResponse on success

backlog.title: UI — PR URL input form
backlog.description: PrUrlForm component: text input + submit button. Client-side URL validation. Uses shadcn/ui Input and Button.
acceptance_criteria: Shows inline validation error for invalid URLs on blur

backlog.title: UI — Loading state
backlog.description: AnalysisLoading component: skeleton/spinner with status message while analysis is in progress.

backlog.title: UI — Analysis results display
backlog.description: AnalysisResults component: renders summary, key changes, risks (color-coded by severity), and suggestions. Uses shadcn/ui Card and Badge.
acceptance_criteria: Renders key changes with file references

backlog.title: UI — Error display
backlog.description: ErrorDisplay component: user-friendly error messages mapped from error codes, with retry button.
acceptance_criteria: Maps error codes to friendly messages

backlog.title: Main page — full flow integration
backlog.description: Wire all components on page.tsx. State machine: idle -> loading -> success/error. Calls POST /api/analyze.
acceptance_criteria: Retry resets to idle with URL pre-filled

backlog.title: CI/CD pipeline
backlog.description: GitHub Actions: CI (lint, typecheck, test on PRs) and CD (deploy to Vercel on merge to main).
acceptance_criteria: CI runs on PRs to develop and main
CI runs lint, typecheck, test in parallel
CD triggers on push to main

backlog.title: Polish — rate limiting, metadata, README
backlog.description: In-memory rate limiter (10 req/min per IP), OpenGraph tags, favicon, comprehensive README.
acceptance_criteria: README covers setup, env vars, dev, testing, deployment
